things.name: Porto Montenegro
things.description: Ultra-luxury superyacht marina and resort in the Bay of Kotor

things.name: Bay of Kotor (Boka Kotorska)
things.description: Europe's southernmost fjord-like bay surrounded by dramatic mountains and medieval towns

things.name: Kotor Old Town
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage medieval walled city just 10 minutes from Tivat airport

things.name: Our Lady of the Rocks
things.description: Artificial island church in the Bay of Kotor built on a submerged reef

things.name: Lustica Peninsula
things.description: Wild unspoilt peninsula with olive groves, hidden coves and the developing Rose village

things.name: Buket Fortress
things.description: Venetian-era fort above Tivat with views across the bay

things.name: Perast
things.description: Baroque lakeside village with 17 churches and 12 palaces in just one street

things.name: St George Island
things.description: Cypress-covered island in the Bay of Kotor visible from Perast

things.name: Tivat Promenade & Beaches
things.description: Seafront promenade and sandy beaches in the sheltered bay

things.name: Kalimanj Cemetery
things.description: Historic cemetery with Venetian-era tombstones and sea views
